info.name: Cloudflare R2 API
info.description:
Cloudflare R2 is S3-compatible object storage with zero egress fees. The R2 API allows developers to create and manage buckets, upload and retrieve objects, and configure access controls. R2 supports the S3 API for compatibility with existing tools and SDKs. This specification covers the Cloudflare management API for R2 bucket administration.

Contact Support:
 Name: Cloudflare Support
